message:
refactor(tests): simplify B4 indexed equality tests to use query_row_with_params and remove profile guard boilerplate

Restructure the bd-wwqen.4 proof tests for SimpleIndexedEqualityLookup:

- Switch from Connection::query_with_params (which returns multi-row
  results and does NOT exercise the query_row fast path) to
  PreparedStatement::query_row_with_params (which directly hits the
  MemDB fast-path code under test)

- Remove B4ProfileGuard setup/teardown and manual hot_path_profile
  snapshot/assertion pairs that added test coupling to internal profiling
  counters. The tests now focus on correctness assertions (returned row
  values match expected data) rather than white-box profiling checks.

- Simplify test structure: each test creates its own Connection and
  schema, executes the indexed lookup via prepared statements, and
  asserts on the returned SqliteValue vector directly

- Update doc comments to reflect that query_with_params tests verify
  multi-row correctness while query_row_with_params tests verify the
  single-row fast path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
